message:
✨ UX cleanup: reduce sidebar to 9 core dashboards, add recommended dashboards in customize modal (#1922)

- Reduce default sidebar from 28 to 9 core dashboards (Dashboard, My Clusters,
  Cluster Admin, Deploy, AI/ML, AI Agents, CI/CD, Alerts, Arcade)
- Add DISCOVERABLE_DASHBOARDS export with 20 remaining dashboards
- Add "Recommended Dashboards" section in AddCardModal browse tab
- Add restoreDashboard() to useSidebarConfig for adding discoverable dashboards
- Bump sidebar storage key v10→v11 for migration
- Move Kubectl Terminal + Node Debug to top of Cluster Admin dashboard
- Remove "Try a Mission" from GettingStartedBanner (keep MissionCTA)
- Route "Explore Dashboards" to customize modal instead of sidebar scroll

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

     setConfig((prev) => ({ ...prev, isMobileOpen: !prev.isMobileOpen }))
   }, [])
 
+  // Add a discoverable dashboard to the sidebar with its original ID (not a generated custom ID)
+  const restoreDashboard = useCallback((dashboard: SidebarItem) => {
+    setConfig((prev) => {
+      // Skip if already present
+      if (prev.primaryNav.some((item) => item.id === dashboard.id)) return prev
+      const newItem: SidebarItem = {
+        ...dashboard,
+        order: prev.primaryNav.length,
+      }
+      return { ...prev, primaryNav: [...prev.primaryNav, newItem] }
+    })
+  }, [])
+
   const resetToDefault = useCallback(() => {
     setConfig(applyDashboardFilter(DEFAULT_CONFIG))
   }, [])
@@ -434,6 +454,7 @@ export function useSidebarConfig() {
